_note: Copy this file to external_services.json, or set NOVEL_EXTERNAL_SERVICES_CONFIG=/path/to/your/services.json. Values here are deployment defaults; CLI/Web form fields can still override them for a single run.

comfyui._note: Text-to-image service. The app talks to ComfyUI through /prompt, /history and /view.
comfyui.style_preset: clean subject separation, layered depth, expressive body language, atmospheric perspective

voxcpm2._note: VoxCPM2 local worker. The main app stays standard-library-only and starts voxcpm2_audiobook_worker.py with this Python/runtime.

image_frame._note: Image Frame HTTP service used when illustration backend is image_frame.

audio_frame._note: Audio Frame HTTP service used when audiobook backend is audio_frame.

audiobook._note: Use local_worker for the legacy in-process VoxCPM2 worker, or audio_frame for the HTTP Audio Frame service.
